summary: Iteration 7 — end-to-end verification of the new Coach Pulse weekly digest feature. Backend: added /app/backend/tests/test_coach_pulse.py with 16 pytest cases covering (a) GET /api/coach-pulse/subscription auto-creates + returns {is_active,last_sent_at,email}, (b) POST subscribe/unsubscribe toggle + auth guards, (c) GET /api/coach-pulse/preview returns text/html with coach name, 'Week of' label, personal stats labels (matches/clips/markers/notes) and either the network-not-ready callout or the ready header, (d) GET /api/coach-pulse/unsubscribe/{token} returns 200 HTML 'Link expired' for invalid tokens (NOT 404), (e) POST /api/coach-pulse/send-test gracefully returns 502 with the Resend 'verify a domain' detail — no crash, (f) POST /api/coach-pulse/send-weekly returns {sent,skipped} with int counts, (g) render_coach_pulse_email unit tests for both network_ready=False (callout) and network_ready=True (weaknesses/strengths/positions/recruit bars all render). All 16/16 PASS. Full regression sweep: 80/80 PASS (64 previous + 16 new) — no regressions. Frontend: Dashboard renders <CoachPulseCard /> with all 4 testids (coach-pulse-card, -toggle-btn, -preview-btn, -test-btn). Toggle correctly flips 'Subscribe' ↔ 'Subscribed' on click (verified twice round-trip). Send Test button surfaced the exact Resend sandbox error message in the status chip: 'Email send failed: You can only send testing emails to your own email address (ben.buursma@gmail.com)...' — graceful failure, no crash. Preview button opened a new tab with blob: URL containing rendered HTML (verified 'Coach Pulse', 'Hi ', 'Week of' all present). Only console error is the expected 502 from send-test (documented Resend sandbox policy).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/coach_pulse.py:_build_email_for hard-codes fallback base URL 'https://scout-lens.preview.emergentagent.com' when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL_PUBLIC env var is unset — this preview URL could drift across environments. Consider falling back to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from backend/.env (already protected), or failing fast if neither is set, rather than baking a URL string into source.

routes/coach_pulse.py:/send-weekly is auth-required but any logged-in user can trigger a platform-wide email blast to ALL active subscribers. This is acknowledged in the module docstring ('admin: blast') but there is zero admin-role gate — recommend a role check (current_user['role'] in ('admin','owner')) or feature-flag before this reaches production. A malicious/accidental trigger could burn Resend quota.

routes/coach_pulse.py:_send_via_resend catches bare Exception and surfaces the raw error string in HTTPException detail — OK for dev but in prod this leaks Resend API internals to the UI (the test-chip already shows the full 'verify a domain at resend.com/domains' URL). Consider logging full error server-side and returning a sanitized 'Email provider rejected delivery' to the client.

services/coach_pulse_email.py:render_coach_pulse_email has no safety cap on network list sizes (slice(:5)/:6/:8 is applied) but no truncation on individual item text — a malicious/long 'text' field from network aggregates would blow out the email layout. Add a .strip()[:120] on each text before escape().

CoachPulseCard.js:openPreview uses axios responseType:'text' + Blob URL + setTimeout revoke — works but leaks the Blob URL if the new tab is slow to load. Consider revoking onbeforeunload of the new tab, or switching to a signed short-lived download token endpoint so the browser can open the URL directly without Bearer header gymnastics.
CoachPulseCard.js has no loading spinner — `busy` just disables buttons with opacity-50. On slow networks the Preview click feels unresponsive for 1-2s. Minor UX polish.

success_rate.backend: 100% — 16/16 coach-pulse cases + 64/64 prior regression = 80/80 total PASS
success_rate.frontend: 100% — CoachPulseCard renders, Subscribe↔Subscribed toggle flips correctly, Send Test gracefully surfaces Resend 502 in status chip, Preview opens new tab with valid HTML (Coach Pulse/Hi/Week of all present), no unexpected console errors

seed_data_creation: None persistent. Tests subscribe/unsubscribe the testcoach user multiple times but the final test_send_weekly_returns_counts leaves the user in unsubscribed state (to avoid burning Resend quota on re-runs). A coach_pulse_subscriptions doc is auto-created for testcoach; coach_pulse_logs may contain 1-2 'test' entries from send-test attempts (each was a 502 failure, so no actual email delivered). No orphan data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Pulse feature is fully green. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_coach_pulse.py has 7 classes (TestSubscription, TestPreview, TestPublicUnsubscribe, TestSendTest, TestSendWeekly, TestEmailTemplate) and reuses the auth_headers session-scoped fixture from conftest.py. The Resend integration is in sandbox mode — only ben.buursma@gmail.com is verified for sending; any other recipient returns 502 with a specific detail message. Tests accept EITHER 200 or 502 for send-test to handle both cases. Network-ready branch of the email template is covered by unit test (mocked network dict), since the live DB only has 1 coach (<3 k-anon threshold), the preview endpoint currently returns the 'Network insights unlock at 3+ coaches' callout — this is correct and documented. To exercise the full network-ready email path live: seed 2+ more coaches with matches that have insights.strengths/insights.weaknesses arrays containing overlapping themes (≥3 coaches hitting the same phrase). The frontend CoachPulseCard is located at /app/frontend/src/pages/components/CoachPulseCard.js and is imported in Dashboard.js. data-testids are: coach-pulse-card, coach-pulse-toggle-btn, coach-pulse-preview-btn, coach-pulse-test-btn, coach-pulse-status.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. All 11 feature requirements listed in the review request verified working (6 backend endpoints + graceful Resend error handling + env-var loading + unit template tests + frontend card/toggle/preview/test behaviors + 80/80 regression).
